data.body:
Decision log (Clusters A/B/C):
CLUSTER A (MCP gates): REBAR_MCP_READONLY=KEEP; REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM=KEEP; REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE -> RENAME REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC (config mcp.allow_jira_sync; gates live/applying Jira writes vs dry-run default; alias old).
CLUSTER B (LLM): keep prefix; settings ALSO become [tool.rebar] llm.* config keys (env overrides), secret env-only:
  REBAR_LLM_MODEL/MODEL_PROVIDER/BASE_URL/MAX_TOKENS/TIMEOUT/REPO_PATH/MCP_SERVERS -> KEEP + config keys (llm.*); MCP_SERVERS uses TOML nesting (retire JSON-in-env).
  REBAR_LLM_API_KEY -> KEEP (secret, env-only).
  REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS -> RENAME REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS + config llm.max_steps; DOC: 'max agent loop steps before abort; ~2 steps/tool-call; default 25~=12 tool calls; raise if review hits step budget'.
  REBAR_LLM_RUNNER -> REMOVE as public knob. DERIVE: langflow auto-selected when LANGFLOW_URL+FLOW_ID configured, else in-process langgraph. fake -> test-only injection (library arg, off public surface). deepagents -> experimental opt-in flag REBAR_LLM_EXPERIMENTAL_HARNESS=deepagents (clearly experimental).
CLUSTER C (external secrets): ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY/SECRET_KEY/HOST, LANGFLOW_URL/FLOW_ID/API_KEY -> KEEP ALL (third-party STANDARD names read by provider/Langfuse/Langflow SDKs; do NOT rebar-namespace). Doc gap: only in docs/llm-framework.md, not README; no single config reference -> config epic docs task f81a to unify.
